executive_summary: Analyzed 53 ticket(s) across 20 company IDs from the current webhook batch with primary focus on repeat patterns, prevention opportunities, and automation candidates. Maintenance was isolated at 5 ticket(s), while the strongest non-maintenance pattern currently points to Email. This report is intentionally weighted toward what should be prevented, standardized, or automated next.
automation_1: Bundle recurring maintenance notices, maintenance-mode timing, and completion notices into one reusable automation playbook.
automation_2: Normalize ticket categorization in the webhook/subworkflow so repeated issue types cluster cleanly for future scoring.
automation_3: Enrich each ticket with device/service metadata so repetitive fixes can be ranked for automation more accurately.
cto_1: Company 311 crossed the noisy-company threshold with 15 tickets.
cto_2: Company 0 crossed the noisy-company threshold with 10 tickets.
cto_3: Maintenance volume is 5 ticket(s) and remains isolated from the main reactive rankings.
